big_problem: Lab Pro gates still feel like errors — generic copy on dynasty dashboard.
epic: Lab L4 — Pro upgrade gates feel like upgrade, not error
slice_title: Dynasty dashboard Pro gate bespoke teaser rows + Razzle pitch
acceptance_ref: T6 screenshot gravity — Pro gate shows riser/faller preview
acceptance_commands: node --input-type=module -e "import { teaserRowsForPanel, upgradePitchForPanel } from './apps/web/lib/panel-upgrade-teaser.ts'; const r=teaserRowsForPanel('dashboard'); if(r.length!==3||!r[0].detail.includes('Riser')) throw new Error('bad rows'); const p=upgradePitchForPanel('dashboard','Razzle'); if(!p.includes('risers')) throw new Error('bad pitch'); console.log('OK', r[0].name);"
